zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Merlay於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，她的父親Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth41歲，母親Alice de Stuteville27歲。她和Richard de Gobion至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1230年12月29日在英國英格蘭享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Merlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Merlay was born about 1180, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth, was 41 and her mother, Alice de Stuteville, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Richard de Gobion. She died on 29 December 1230, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Merlay est née environ 1180, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Stuteville, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Richard de Gobion. Elle est décédée le 29 décembre 1230, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

Sie hatte mit Richard de Gobion mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Dezember 1230 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Merlayが約1180年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで生まれた時，父Roger de Merlay Lord Morpethは41歳，母Alice de Stutevilleは27歳であった。彼女はRichard de Gobionとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1230年12月29日にイギリスイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Merlay(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Stuteville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Gobion(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 12월 29일 영국 잉글랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Merlay родилась около 1180 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Stuteville, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Richard de Gobion. Она умерла 29 декабря 1230 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
